lastReleaseMessage: Restore dates.ts after a botched regex replacement in the...

barRaise.topFinding: v0.4.0 and v0.4.1 shipped on 2026-06-07, closing the thirteen-cycle uncommitted-release blocker, but the release went out carrying every known defect. The v0.4.1 release nulled the live dashboard barRaise block, the broken em-dash sanitizer in discord-notify.ps1 posted a raw em-dash to the public channel, the leaked Discord webhook (HIGH, thirteenth cycle) was used by two real releases while still tracked in git, and v0.4.0 shipped a TypeScript error that broke the SPA deploy because release.ps1 has no preship build gate.
